name: pushword/repurpose
description: Repurpose a Pushword page into ready-to-post social carousels: an agent-authored JSON spec rendered to self-contained SVG slides, with server-side text layout, focal-point cropping and PNG/PDF export.

suggest.pushword/api: Expose the carousel spec over the token-authenticated REST API for AI agents.
suggest.pushword/flat: Round-trip carousels as flat JSON files through pw:flat:sync.
